title: End Villager Trader
description: Adds a new villager trader in the End, offering End-related items, including a new Shulker Armor
body:
### This mod adds a new villager to the End.

**The End Villager Trader can only be found in his ship, which spawns high in the sky across the End biomes.**

You can also summon him anywhere by placing his Shulkerblock Workstation (found in every End trader ship) next to a jobless villager.
![End Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cb1cda25cdf1bf5991b23a1f1ad28cae09efd72.jpeg)


### End Villager Trader:

- Buys and sells End-related items.
- Sells rockets for Elytra at master level.
- Sells a brand-new Shulker Armor set for the player.
![End Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f432b8745e751177f069bde1947a927157cd99.jpeg)

### Shulker Armor:

- Has the same stats as diamond armor, but with knockback resistance.
- Wearing the full set grants the player the Slow Falling effect, making End exploration safer.
- Can be repaired with Shulker Shells.
![Shulker Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f23a44b1033af4e3bc8914738de019fb357a009.jpeg)


 

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks

Made by Leonxkingx and MadeBySanny
